---
title: "Brand Design & Color Palette"
---

## KaosMaps Brand Colors

The KaosMaps design system uses a dark-first palette with vibrant accent colors. These tokens are shared across both macOS (Swift) and mobile (React Native) platforms.

### Core Palette

| Token | Hex | Role |
|-------|-----|------|
| **Cyan** | `#06b6d4` | Primary accent, borders, glow |
| **Teal** | `#14b8a6` | Secondary accent, section headers |
| **Magenta** | `#ec4899` | Tertiary accent, favorites |
| **Active** | `#facc15` | Active states, highlights |
| **Success** | `#22c55e` | Confirmations, checkmarks |
| **Warning** | `#f97316` | Alerts, caution states |

### Surface Colors

| Token | Hex | Role |
|-------|-----|------|
| **Primary** | `#0a0a0f` | Main background |
| **Secondary** | `#12121a` | Tab bar, nav background |
| **Card** | `#1a1a24` | Card backgrounds, inputs |

### Text Colors

| Token | Value | Role |
|-------|-------|------|
| **Primary** | `#e2e8f0` | Headings, body text |
| **Secondary** | `rgba(204,251,241,0.55)` | Subtitles, labels |
| **Muted** | `rgba(153,246,228,0.28)` | Placeholders, disabled |

## Interactive Color Palette Explorer

Explore and customize each KaosMaps brand color. Use the sliders to adjust hue, saturation, and lightness to find the perfect variation.

```{ojs}
//| code-fold: true
//| code-summary: "Color palette explorer code"

viewof selectedColor = Inputs.radio(
  ["Cyan", "Teal", "Magenta", "Active", "Success", "Warning"],
  { value: "Cyan", label: "Select color" }
)

baseColors = ({
  Cyan:    { h: 189, s: 95, l: 43 },
  Teal:    { h: 168, s: 80, l: 40 },
  Magenta: { h: 330, s: 81, l: 60 },
  Active:  { h: 48,  s: 96, l: 53 },
  Success: { h: 142, s: 71, l: 45 },
  Warning: { h: 25,  s: 95, l: 53 }
})

base = baseColors[selectedColor]

viewof hueShift = Inputs.range([-30, 30], {
  value: 0, step: 1, label: "Hue shift"
})

viewof satAdjust = Inputs.range([-40, 40], {
  value: 0, step: 1, label: "Saturation"
})

viewof lightAdjust = Inputs.range([-30, 30], {
  value: 0, step: 1, label: "Lightness"
})
```

```{ojs}
//| code-fold: true

function clamp(val, min, max) { return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, val)); }

function hslToHex(h, s, l) {
  h = ((h % 360) + 360) % 360;
  s = clamp(s, 0, 100) / 100;
  l = clamp(l, 0, 100) / 100;
  const a = s * Math.min(l, 1 - l);
  const f = n => {
    const k = (n + h / 30) % 12;
    const color = l - a * Math.max(Math.min(k - 3, 9 - k, 1), -1);
    return Math.round(255 * color).toString(16).padStart(2, '0');
  };
  return `#${f(0)}${f(8)}${f(4)}`;
}

adjustedH = clamp(base.h + hueShift, 0, 360)
adjustedS = clamp(base.s + satAdjust, 0, 100)
adjustedL = clamp(base.l + lightAdjust, 0, 100)
currentHex = hslToHex(adjustedH, adjustedS, adjustedL)

// Generate the palette variations
variations = {
  const steps = [
    { name: "Darkest",  lAdj: -25, sAdj: 10 },
    { name: "Darker",   lAdj: -15, sAdj: 5 },
    { name: "Dark",     lAdj: -8,  sAdj: 2 },
    { name: "Base",     lAdj: 0,   sAdj: 0 },
    { name: "Light",    lAdj: 8,   sAdj: -2 },
    { name: "Lighter",  lAdj: 15,  sAdj: -8 },
    { name: "Lightest", lAdj: 25,  sAdj: -15 },
    { name: "Muted",    lAdj: 5,   sAdj: -30 },
    { name: "Vibrant",  lAdj: -3,  sAdj: 20 },
  ];
  return steps.map(s => ({
    name: s.name,
    hex: hslToHex(adjustedH, clamp(adjustedS + s.sAdj, 0, 100), clamp(adjustedL + s.lAdj, 0, 100)),
    h: adjustedH,
    s: clamp(adjustedS + s.sAdj, 0, 100),
    l: clamp(adjustedL + s.lAdj, 0, 100)
  }));
}
```

### Current Color: **${selectedColor}**

```{ojs}
//| code-fold: true
//| echo: false

html`<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin: 16px 0;">
  <div style="width: 80px; height: 80px; border-radius: 12px; background: ${currentHex}; box-shadow: 0 0 20px ${currentHex}44;"></div>
  <div>
    <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; font-family: monospace;">${currentHex}</div>
    <div style="font-size: 14px; color: #888;">HSL(${adjustedH}, ${adjustedS}%, ${adjustedL}%)</div>
  </div>
</div>`
```

### Palette Variations

```{ojs}
//| code-fold: true
//| echo: false

html`<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(120px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; margin: 16px 0;">
  ${variations.map(v => html`
    <div style="text-align: center;">
      <div style="width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 10px; background: ${v.hex}; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px ${v.hex}33; margin-bottom: 6px; cursor: pointer;" title="${v.hex}" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText('${v.hex}')"></div>
      <div style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;">${v.name}</div>
      <div style="font-size: 11px; font-family: monospace; color: #888;">${v.hex}</div>
    </div>
  `)}
</div>`
```

::: {.callout-tip}
## Click to Copy
Click any color swatch above to copy its hex code to your clipboard.
:::

### Full Palette Preview (All Colors)

```{ojs}
//| code-fold: true
//| echo: false

allColors = {
  const palette = {};
  for (const [name, hsl] of Object.entries(baseColors)) {
    const h = hsl.h + hueShift;
    const s = clamp(hsl.s + satAdjust, 0, 100);
    const l = clamp(hsl.l + lightAdjust, 0, 100);
    palette[name] = {
      base: hslToHex(h, s, l),
      dark: hslToHex(h, clamp(s + 5, 0, 100), clamp(l - 15, 0, 100)),
      light: hslToHex(h, clamp(s - 8, 0, 100), clamp(l + 15, 0, 100)),
      muted: hslToHex(h, clamp(s - 30, 0, 100), clamp(l + 5, 0, 100)),
      vibrant: hslToHex(h, clamp(s + 20, 0, 100), clamp(l - 3, 0, 100)),
    };
  }
  return palette;
}

html`<table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 16px 0;">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th style="text-align: left; padding: 8px;">Color</th>
      <th style="padding: 8px;">Dark</th>
      <th style="padding: 8px;">Base</th>
      <th style="padding: 8px;">Light</th>
      <th style="padding: 8px;">Muted</th>
      <th style="padding: 8px;">Vibrant</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    ${Object.entries(allColors).map(([name, shades]) => html`
      <tr>
        <td style="padding: 8px; font-weight: 600;">${name}</td>
        ${["dark", "base", "light", "muted", "vibrant"].map(shade => html`
          <td style="padding: 4px; text-align: center;">
            <div style="width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 8px; background: ${shades[shade]}; margin: 0 auto; cursor: pointer;" title="${shades[shade]}" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText('${shades[shade]}')"></div>
            <div style="font-size: 10px; font-family: monospace; color: #888; margin-top: 2px;">${shades[shade]}</div>
          </td>
        `)}
      </tr>
    `)}
  </tbody>
</table>`
```

## Light Mode Contrast Optimization

The default KaosMaps green (`#22c55e` / green-500) has a WCAG contrast ratio of only **2.1:1** against white backgrounds — failing AA standards. Our light theme uses optimized alternatives:

| Color | Default | Optimized | Contrast vs White |
|-------|---------|-----------|-------------------|
| Green | `#22c55e` (500) | `#15803d` (700) | 4.5:1 (AA pass) |
| Cyan  | `#06b6d4` (500) | `#0891b2` (600) | 4.6:1 (AA pass) |
| Teal  | `#14b8a6` (500) | `#0d9488` (600) | 4.5:1 (AA pass) |
| Pink  | `#ec4899` (500) | `#be185d` (700) | 5.2:1 (AA pass) |

::: {.callout-warning}
## WCAG AA Minimum
Text must have a contrast ratio of at least **4.5:1** against its background. The optimized colors above all meet this threshold for light mode while staying visually connected to the brand palette.
:::

## Platform Implementations

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Swift (macOS)

```swift
public enum Brand {
    public static let cyan    = NSColor(hex: "#06b6d4")
    public static let teal    = NSColor(hex: "#14b8a6")
    public static let magenta = NSColor(hex: "#ec4899")
    public static let active  = NSColor(hex: "#facc15")

    public enum Surface {
        public static let primary   = NSColor(hex: "#0a0a0f")
        public static let secondary = NSColor(hex: "#12121a")
        public static let card      = NSColor(hex: "#1a1a24")
    }
}
```

## TypeScript (Mobile)

```typescript
export const colors = {
  brand: {
    cyan: "#06b6d4",
    teal: "#14b8a6",
    magenta: "#ec4899",
    active: "#facc15",
    success: "#22c55e",
    warning: "#f97316",
  },
  surface: {
    primary: "#0a0a0f",
    secondary: "#12121a",
    card: "#1a1a24",
  },
  text: {
    primary: "#e2e8f0",
    secondary: "rgba(204,251,241,0.55)",
    muted: "rgba(153,246,228,0.28)",
  },
} as const;
```

## Tailwind (NativeWind)

```javascript
// tailwind.config.js
module.exports = {
  theme: {
    extend: {
      colors: {
        brand: {
          cyan: "#06b6d4",
          teal: "#14b8a6",
          magenta: "#ec4899",
          active: "#facc15",
        },
        surface: {
          primary: "#0a0a0f",
          secondary: "#12121a",
          card: "#1a1a24",
        },
      },
    },
  },
};
```

:::

## Glow Effect

The signature KaosMaps glow combines layered shadows and subtle borders:

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Swift (NSView)

```swift
layer?.shadowColor = Brand.cyan.cgColor
layer?.shadowRadius = 20
layer?.shadowOpacity = 0.15
layer?.shadowOffset = .zero
layer?.borderColor = Brand.cyan.withAlphaComponent(0.3).cgColor
layer?.borderWidth = 1
```

## React Native

```typescript
glowOuter: {
  shadowColor: "#06b6d4",
  shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 0 },
  shadowOpacity: 0.15,
  shadowRadius: 30,
},
glowInner: {
  borderWidth: 1,
  borderColor: "rgba(6,182,212,0.3)",
},
```

:::
